content:
---
title: Reservation Pipeline
description: Full stage lifecycle for the primary booking pipeline including stage IDs, properties, and automations.
date: 2026-03-14
tags: hubspot, pipeline, reservation, stages, lifecycle, deal-properties, automation
group: flows
---

# Reservation Pipeline -- Full Stage Lifecycle

> Covers [SS4.1 Mountain-Reservation Pipeline](../hubspot-pms-sync-spec.md#41-mountain-reservation-pipeline) of the HubSpot / PMS Integration Spec.

## Overview

The primary booking lifecycle pipeline. Guests enter when they inquire or pay a deposit and progress through sales stages to Closed Won or exit to Nurturing/Not Qualified/Blacklisted/Cancelled.

**Pipeline ID:** `873502775`

## Pipeline Flow

```
                           ENTRY POINTS
          .------------------------------------------.
          | Guest inquiry form (HS creates deal)      |-----.
          | PMS creates booking (Flow A or B)         |----.|
          | Promo deposit paid (landing page)         |-. ||
          '------------------------------------------'  | ||
                                                        | ||
                  .-------------------------------------' ||
                  |     .--------------------------------' |
                  |     |     .---------------------------'
                  v     v     v
          .-------------------.
          |   INQUIRY MADE    |<------- PMS: inquiry
          |   1308814483      |
          '-------------------'
              |           |
    Deposit   |           |  Meeting scheduled
    paid      |           |
              v           |
  .------------------------.  |
  | PROMO DEPOSIT PAID     |  |
  | 1311051092              |  |
  '------------------------'  |
              |               |
              | Meeting       |
              | scheduled     |
              v               v
          .-------------------.
          |    BOOKED CALL    |<------- HS auto (meeting detected)
          |    1308814484     |
          '-------------------'
              |           |
    Call       |           |  No show
    happens    |           |
              v           v
  .-------------------.  .-------------------.
  |      QUOTE        |  |     NO SHOW       |-------.
  |    1308814486     |  |   1310267547      |       |
  '-------------------'  '-------------------'       |
      |   |   |   |              ^                   |
      |   |   |   |              | Re-scheduled      |
      |   |   |   '--------------+-------------------'
      |   |   |
      |   |   '-----------.
      |   |               |
      |   v               v
      | .-------------. .-------------------.
      | | CL-NURTURING| | CL-NOT QUALIFIED  |
      | | 1309341807  | | 1309341808        |
      | '-------------' '-------------------'
      |       |
      |       '-------> Nurturing Pipeline
      |
      |   .-------------------.
      |   | CL-BLACKLISTED   |
      |   | 1309341809        |
      |   '-------------------'
      |         | (Deal frozen, no PMS sync)
      |
      v
  .-------------------.
  | PENDING APPROVAL  |<------- PMS: pending_approval
  | 1309405752        |
  '-------------------'
          |
          | Admin approves
          v
  .-------------------.
  |    CLOSED WON     |<------- PMS: confirmed / checked_in / checked_out
  |    1308814489     |
  '-------------------'
          |
          | Cancellation
          v
  .-------------------.
  |    CANCELLED      |<------- PMS: cancelled
  |    1309341806     |
  '-------------------'
          |
          '-------> Recover Pipeline
```

## Stage-by-Stage Detail

---

### INQUIRY MADE (`1308814483`)

**PMS status:** `inquiry`
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Lead

PMS-written properties (on deal creation):

```
dealstage:                           enumeration  = "1308814483"
pipeline:                            enumeration  = "873502775"   # creation only
dealname:                            string       = "{guestName} -- {confirmationNumber}"
hubspot_owner_id:                    enumeration  = booking.hubspotOwnerId   # if sales-rep
deal_source:                         enumeration  = "online_booking" | staff selection
amount:                              number       = booking.totalAmount
gross_revenue:                       number       = booking.totalAmount
room_revenue:                        number       = nightlyRate * nights
total_add_on_revenue:                number       = sum(addons where category != room_revenue)
cash_collected:                      number       = sum(payments: succeeded, !refund)
refund_amount:                       number       = sum(payments: refund, succeeded)
revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees:  number       = totalAmount - sum(addons.taxAmount)
```

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
setter_assigned:                     enumeration  # team member who chases the lead
```

HubSpot automation:
- Lifecycle stage set to **Mountain Lead** on contact
- Auto-moves to Booked Call if a meeting is scheduled

**Exits to:** Promo Deposit Paid, Booked Call

> **Deal name discrepancy:** The spec says format is `"{guestName} -- {confirmationNumber}"`. Live HubSpot deals show `"Mountain -- Reservation | {Name}"` (sales-led) and `"New Reservation | {Name}"` (PMS-created). The PMS will overwrite to spec format on sync.

---

### PROMO DEPOSIT PAID (`1311051092`)

**PMS status:** `deposit_paid`
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Customer

PMS-written properties:

```
dealstage:                           enumeration  = "1311051092"
cash_collected:                      number       = updated with deposit amount
amount:                              number       = booking.totalAmount
gross_revenue:                       number       = booking.totalAmount
room_revenue:                        number       = nightlyRate * nights
total_add_on_revenue:                number       = sum(addons where category != room_revenue)
refund_amount:                       number       = sum(payments: refund, succeeded)
revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees:  number       = totalAmount - sum(addons.taxAmount)
```

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
setter_assigned:                     enumeration  # team member who chases the lead
```

HubSpot automation:
- Lifecycle stage set to **Mountain Customer** on contact (per cheat sheet)
- Auto-moves to Booked Call if a meeting is scheduled

**Exits to:** Booked Call

> **Open question:** Mountain Customer at deposit stage seems premature -- normally reserved for Closed Won. Verify whether the HubSpot workflow truly sets this or if the cheat sheet is aspirational.

---

### BOOKED CALL (`1308814484`)

**PMS status:** -- (HubSpot-internal stage; PMS has no equivalent)
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Opportunity

PMS-written properties: *None -- PMS does not drive this transition.*

Manual HubSpot properties: *None required at this stage.*

HubSpot automation:
- Auto-triggered when a meeting is scheduled on the sales team calendar
- Lifecycle stage set to **Mountain Opportunity** on contact

**Exits to:** Quote, No Show

---

### NO SHOW (`1310267547`)

**PMS status:** -- (HubSpot-internal stage)
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Opportunity

PMS-written properties: *None -- staff manually moves deals here.*

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
deal_owner:                          # reassigned by sales team
deal_source:                         enumeration  # how the lead originated
setter_assigned:                     enumeration  # setter chases to re-book
```

HubSpot automation:
- Task created for setter (Stephanie) to chase
- Lifecycle stage remains **Mountain Opportunity** on contact

**Exits to:** Booked Call (re-scheduled)

---

### QUOTE (`1308814486`)

**PMS status:** `quoted`
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Opportunity

PMS-written properties:

```
dealstage:                           enumeration  = "1308814486"
checkin_date:                        date         = booking.checkIn
checkout_date:                       date         = booking.checkOut
quote_amount:                        number       = booking.quoteAmount
quote_expiry_date:                   date         = booking.quoteExpiresAt
amount:                              number       = booking.totalAmount
gross_revenue:                       number       = booking.totalAmount
room_revenue:                        number       = nightlyRate * nights
total_add_on_revenue:                number       = sum(addons where category != room_revenue)
cash_collected:                      number       = sum(payments: succeeded, !refund)
refund_amount:                       number       = sum(payments: refund, succeeded)
revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees:  number       = totalAmount - sum(addons.taxAmount)
```

Manual HubSpot properties: *None required at this stage (dates/amounts come from PMS).*

HubSpot automation:
- Task: follow up with guest in 8 hours
- Task: cancel quote and move to CL-Nurturing if quote expires
- Lifecycle stage remains **Mountain Opportunity** on contact
- **SNT note:** "Cancel quote in SNT" automation must be updated for PMS

**Exits to:** Pending Approval, CL-Nurturing, CL-Not Qualified, CL-Blacklisted

---

### CL -- Nurturing (`1309341807`)

**PMS status:** `nurturing`
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Opportunity

> Live HubSpot label uses an en-dash: "CL -- Nurturing". The PMS maps by stage ID, not label.

PMS-written properties:

```
dealstage:                           enumeration  = "1309341807"
```

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
loss_reason:                         enumeration  # required
  # Options: Moved to Nurturing, Not Qualified, Blacklisted,
  #          Timing, Financials, Partner, Uncertain/Confused,
  #          Competitor, No Response, Other
closed_lost_reason:                  string       # optional free-text detail
```

HubSpot automation:
- Creates new deal in Mountain-Nurturing Pipeline
- Lifecycle stage remains **Mountain Opportunity** on contact

**Exits to:** Nurturing Pipeline

---

### CL -- Not Qualified (`1309341808`)

**PMS status:** `not_qualified`
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Not Qualified

PMS-written properties:

```
dealstage:                           enumeration  = "1309341808"
```

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
not_qualified_reason:                enumeration  # required
  # Internal value              | Display label
  # ----------------------------|-----------------------------------
  # "Not a Good Fit"            | "Physical Restrictions"
  # "On Disability / Welfare"   | "On Disability / Welfare ($)"
  # "Only Travels with Pet/Kids"| "Only Travels with Pet/Kids"
  #
  # The API sends/receives internal values, not display labels.
```

HubSpot automation:
- Lifecycle stage set to **Mountain Not Qualified** on contact

**Exits to:** Not Qualified Pipeline

---

### CL -- Blacklisted (`1309341809`)

**PMS status:** `blacklisted` -- but **PMS does NOT sync** (skips deal update entirely)
**Lifecycle stage:** Blacklisted

PMS-written properties: *None -- sync is skipped for blacklisted bookings.*

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
do_not_contact:                      bool         # contact-level property (not on deal)
blacklist_reason:                    string       # free-text reason
```

HubSpot automation:
- Lifecycle stage set to **Blacklisted** on contact

**Note:** `do_not_contact` is a contact property, not a deal property. PMS checks this before deal creation. Deal is frozen in HubSpot -- no further PMS interaction.

**Exits to:** Deal frozen (no pipeline transition)

---

### PENDING APPROVAL (`1309405752`)

**PMS status:** `pending_approval`
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Customer

PMS-written properties:

```
dealstage:                           enumeration  = "1309405752"
confirmation_number:                 string       = booking.confirmationNumber
gross_revenue:                       number       = booking.totalAmount
revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees:  number       = totalAmount - sum(addons.taxAmount)
cash_collected:                      number       = sum(payments: succeeded, !refund)
checkin_date:                        date         = booking.checkIn
checkout_date:                       date         = booking.checkOut
hubspot_owner_id:                    enumeration  = booking.hubspotOwnerId   # if set
deal_source:                         enumeration  = staff selection           # if set
amount:                              number       = booking.totalAmount
room_revenue:                        number       = nightlyRate * nights
total_add_on_revenue:                number       = sum(addons where category != room_revenue)
refund_amount:                       number       = sum(payments: refund, succeeded)
```

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
closed_won_reason:                   string       # required before admin approves to Closed Won
```

> **PMS vs manual overlap:** The spec says PMS writes `hubspot_owner_id` and `deal_source` "if set". On sales-led deals, these are typically already filled by staff. On guest self-serve deals, these may be blank and require manual entry. The cheat sheet lists "Deal Owner" and "Deal Source" as manual fields at this stage because staff must verify/fill them regardless of whether PMS pre-populated them.

HubSpot automation:
- Task for admin to reconcile with PMS (replaces legacy "Reconcile with SNT")
- Lifecycle stage set to **Mountain Customer** on contact

**Exits to:** Closed Won

---

### CLOSED WON (`1308814489`)

**PMS status:** `confirmed`, `checked_in`, `checked_out` (all three map to this stage)
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Customer (first stay) / Mountain Evangelist (repeat stays)

PMS-written properties:

```
dealstage:                           enumeration  = "1308814489"
amount:                              number       = booking.totalAmount         # final
gross_revenue:                       number       = booking.totalAmount         # final
room_revenue:                        number       = nightlyRate * nights        # final
total_add_on_revenue:                number       = sum(addons where != room)   # final
cash_collected:                      number       = sum(payments: succeeded)    # final
refund_amount:                       number       = sum(payments: refund)       # final
revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees:  number       = total - tax                 # final
f_b_revenue:                         number       = sum(f&b addons)
fee_revenue:                         number       = sum(fee addons)
tax_revenue:                         number       = sum(addons.taxAmount)
last_stay_date:                      date         = booking.checkOut            # on checked_out
listing:                             string       = "{unit.code} - {unit.name}"
```

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
stayntouch_reconciled:               bool         # legacy -- becomes PMS reconciled
```

HubSpot automation:
- Creates deal in Upsell Pipeline
- Creates deal in Rebooking Program Pipeline
- 265-day anniversary task for deal owner
- Lifecycle stage set to **Mountain Customer** (or **Mountain Evangelist** for repeat)
- After 90 days post-stay with no new booking: **Mountain Cold Customer**

**Exits to:** Cancelled

---

### CANCELLED (`1309341806`)

**PMS status:** `cancelled`
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Lead

PMS-written properties:

```
dealstage:                           enumeration  = "1309341806"
refund_amount:                       number       = sum(payments: refund, succeeded)
cash_collected:                      number       = sum(payments: succeeded, !refund)  # recomputed
amount:                              number       = booking.totalAmount
gross_revenue:                       number       = booking.totalAmount
revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees:  number       = total - tax
```

Manual HubSpot properties:

```
cancel__reschedule_request:          string       # free-text cancellation detail
cancellationreschedule_reason:       enumeration
  # Options: "48 Hour Cancellation", "Needs to Move Dates"
refund_noted:                        bool         # NOT "refunded"
```

HubSpot automation:
- Automatically moves deal to Recover Pipeline
- Task for original deal owner to contact guest ASAP
- Lifecycle stage set to **Mountain Lead** on contact

**Exits to:** Recover Pipeline

> **Open question:** Lifecycle demotion to Mountain Lead on cancellation is unusual -- lifecycle stages typically only advance. Verify whether the HubSpot workflow truly demotes or preserves the existing lifecycle stage.

---

## Lifecycle Stage Summary

All lifecycle stages are set by HubSpot automations on the **contact**, not by the PMS.

| Stage | Lifecycle Stage |
|---|---|
| Inquiry Made | Mountain Lead |
| Promo Deposit Paid | Mountain Customer |
| Booked Call | Mountain Opportunity |
| No Show | Mountain Opportunity |
| Quote | Mountain Opportunity |
| CL -- Nurturing | Mountain Opportunity |
| CL -- Not Qualified | Mountain Not Qualified |
| CL -- Blacklisted | Blacklisted |
| Pending Approval | Mountain Customer |
| Closed Won | Mountain Customer / Mountain Evangelist |
| Cancelled | Mountain Lead |

---

## Stage Label Reference

Live HubSpot uses en-dashes in stage labels. The PMS maps by stage ID, not label text.

| Stage ID | Live HubSpot Label | Spec/Doc Label |
|---|---|---|
| `1308814483` | Inquiry Made | INQUIRY MADE |
| `1311051092` | Promo Deposit Paid | PROMO DEPOSIT PAID |
| `1308814484` | Booked Call | BOOKED CALL |
| `1310267547` | No Show | NO SHOW |
| `1308814486` | Quote | QUOTE |
| `1309341807` | CL -- Nurturing | CL -- NURTURING |
| `1309341808` | CL -- Not Qualified | CL -- NOT QUALIFIED |
| `1309341809` | CL -- Blacklisted | CL -- BLACKLISTED |
| `1309405752` | Pending approval | PENDING APPROVAL |
| `1308814489` | Closed Won | CLOSED WON |
| `1309341806` | Cancelled | CANCELLED |
